rationale: The citation is used in the Study 2 robustness section as a specific analytic procedure, not just as general background. The authors explicitly state they used the empirical test suggested by Spiller et al. (2013, p. 286, Case 5) to evaluate the quadratic relationship and report significant marginal effects at both ends of the volume range. This is a concrete methodological use that supports interpretation of their nonlinear result. Although not central to the paper's theory, it meaningfully informs their empirical validation.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Spiller et al. (2013)'s guidance for probing quadratic effects to validate the U-shaped relationship between vehicle sound volume and MSRP. It uses that procedure to show significant negative and positive marginal effects at different parts of the volume distribution.
